required_preferences.fact: Prepares vegetarian, high-fiber, low-saturated-fat dinners for the whole family nightly — proactively avoids processed snacks and fatty dairy products in all recipes

supersedes.fact: Cooks vegetarian dinners for the family every night — never makes separate meals for himself

required_preferences.fact: No personal woodworking/carving projects at all; pursues non-physical creative hobbies after bedtime while injury persists

supersedes.fact: Works on personal woodworking projects only after the kids’ bedtime — never carves for fun during the day

required_preferences.fact: Utilizes evening screen time (kids’ educational shows) 1-2 times per week when solo parenting, to free up time for dinner preparation or work catch-up, despite previous reluctance
Performs daily rehabilitation exercises for lower back pain each morning as prescribed, without exceptions until cleared by the therapist
Introduces a daily after-preschool quiet ritual (such as drawing or reading together) to provide extra reassurance and connection for his daughter during this emotionally difficult transition
Reserves weekday early afternoon sessions for assembling larger batch orders and preparing exclusive packaging for wholesale clients

persona: A stay-at-home parent running a handmade crafts shop on Etsy
